    "pros": "The Plain English Summary demonstrates excellent readability (Flesch-Kincaid Grade 8.0, 53.34 ease) with short sentences (avg 8.76 words) and no long sentences over 30 words.     "pros": "The application clearly articulates potential benefits, including reduced scarring, pain relief, and improved quality of life.
